Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 109 

VALUES: 0 = No 
1 = Yes 

COMMENT: The location records use a unique combination of the following variables (PRVDR_LCTN_ID, 
BLG_LCTN_IND, PRCTC_LCTN_IND, SRVC_LCTN_IND, PRVDR_ADR_LINE_1, PRVDR_ADR_LINE_2, 
PRVDR_ADR_LINE_3, PRVDR_CITY, PRVDR_STATE_CD, PRVDR_ZIP_CD, PRVDR_CNTY_CD, 
BRDR_STATE_IND, PRVDR_STATE_CD_DFRNT_IND).
